---
title: "IV. Jesus as Life and Light of Men"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    pdf-engine: xelatex
mainfont: "Arial"
---

# IV. Jesus as Life and Light of Men

[Opening Song](#)

[Overview Video](#)


## Opening Passage — John 1:1–5
 [John 1:1–5](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A1-5&version=WEB) — "In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God. He was in the beginning with God. All things were made through him, and without him was not any thing made that was made. In him was life, and the life was the light of men. The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it."


## A. Key Greek and Hebrew Words

### Old Testament (Hebrew)
1. Light — אוֹר (ʾôr)

 a. Illumination, guidance, joy, salvation, and God's presence

 b. [Genesis 1:3](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Genesis+1%3A3&version=WEB) — "Let there be light"; [Psalm 27:1](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+27%3A1&version=WEB) — "The LORD is my light"

2. Life — חַיִּים (ḥayyîm)

 a. Vitality, full and abundant life; often covenantal blessing (from root ḥayah — "to live")

 b. [Deuteronomy 30:20](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Deuteronomy+30%3A20&version=WEB) — "For he is your life"

3. Breath of Life — נְשָׁמָה (neshamah)

 a. Life-giving breath from God

 b. [Genesis 2:7](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Genesis+2%3A7&version=WEB) — God breathes the breath of life into Adam


### New Testament (Greek)
1. Light — φῶς (phōs)

 a. Spiritual truth, revelation, purity, divine presence

 b. Contrasts with σκότος (skotos) = darkness (ignorance, sin, evil)

2. Life — ζωή (zōē)

 a. Divine, eternal, abundant life — the very life of God

 b. Distinct from βίος (bios) = biological life

3. Word — λόγος (logos)

 a. Word, reason, divine expression — key in [John 1](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A1-14&version=WEB)

4. Spirit — πνεῦμα (pneuma)

 a. Spirit, breath, wind — associated with giving life


## B. God / Jesus / Spirit / Word as Light

### God the Father as Light
1. [Psalm 27:1](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+27%3A1&version=WEB) — "The Lord is my light and my salvation."

2. [Psalm 36:9](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+36%3A9&version=WEB) — "In your light do we see light."

3. [Isaiah 60:19–20](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Isaiah+60%3A19-20&version=WEB) — "The Lord will be your everlasting light."

4. [Micah 7:8](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Micah+7%3A8&version=WEB) — "When I sit in darkness, the Lord will be a light to me."

5. [1 John 1:5](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1+John+1%3A5&version=WEB) — "God is light, and in him is no darkness at all."


### Jesus as Light
1. [John 1:4–5](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A4-5&version=WEB) — "In him was life, and the life was the light of men."

2. [John 1:9](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A9&version=WEB) — "The true light, which gives light to everyone, was coming into the world."

3. [John 8:12](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+8%3A12&version=WEB) — "I am the light of the world. Whoever follows me will not walk in darkness, but will have the light of life."

4. [John 9:5](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+9%3A5&version=WEB) — "As long as I am in the world, I am the light of the world."

5. [John 12:46](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+12%3A46&version=WEB) — "I have come into the world as light."

6. [Revelation 21:23](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Revelation+21%3A23&version=WEB) — The Lamb is the lamp of the new Jerusalem.


### The Holy Spirit and Light
1. [2 Corinthians 4:6](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=2+Corinthians+4%3A6&version=WEB) — "God… has shone in our hearts to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of God in the face of Jesus Christ."

2. [John 14:26](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+14%3A26&version=WEB); [1 Corinthians 2:10–12](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1+Corinthians+2%3A10-12&version=WEB) — The Spirit illuminates truth.

3. [Ephesians 5:8](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Ephesians+5%3A8&version=WEB) — Believers called to "walk as children of light."

4. [Matthew 5:14–16](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+5%3A14-16&version=WEB) — "You are the light of the world."


### The Word of God as Light
1. [Psalm 119:105](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+119%3A105&version=WEB) — "Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path."

2. [Psalm 119:130](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+119%3A130&version=WEB) — "The unfolding of your words gives light."


## C. God / Jesus / Spirit / Word as Life

### God the Father as Source of Life
1. [Psalm 36:9](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+36%3A9&version=WEB) — "With you is the fountain of life."

2. [Deuteronomy 30:20](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Deuteronomy+30%3A20&version=WEB) — "For he is your life."

3. [Acts 17:25](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Acts+17%3A25&version=WEB) — God gives to all mankind life and breath.

4. [Genesis 2:7](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Genesis+2%3A7&version=WEB) — God breathes the breath of life into Adam.


### Jesus as Life
1. [John 1:4](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A4&version=WEB) — "In him was life."

2. [John 5:26](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+5%3A26&version=WEB) — "The Father has granted the Son also to have life in himself."

3. [John 6:35, 48](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+6%3A35&version=WEB) — "I am the bread of life."

4. [John 10:10](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+10%3A10&version=WEB) — "I came that they may have life and have it abundantly."

5. [John 11:25](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+11%3A25&version=WEB) — "I am the resurrection and the life."

6. [John 14:6](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+14%3A6&version=WEB) — "I am the way, and the truth, and the life."

7. [1 John 5:11–12](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1+John+5%3A11-12&version=WEB) — "God gave us eternal life, and this life is in his Son."


### The Holy Spirit as Life
1. [John 6:63](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+6%3A63&version=WEB) — "It is the Spirit who gives life."

2. [2 Corinthians 3:6](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=2+Corinthians+3%3A6&version=WEB) — "The Spirit gives life."

3. [Romans 8:2](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Romans+8%3A2&version=WEB) — "The law of the Spirit of life has set you free."

4. [Romans 8:11](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Romans+8%3A11&version=WEB) — He "will give life to your mortal bodies through his Spirit."


### The Word of God as Life
1. [John 6:63](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+6%3A63&version=WEB) — "The words that I have spoken to you are spirit and life."

2. [Matthew 4:4](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+4%3A4&version=WEB) / [Deuteronomy 8:3](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Deuteronomy+8%3A3&version=WEB) — "Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word from the mouth of God."


## D. The Relationship Between Light and Life
1. Foundational linking passage

 a. [Psalm 36:9](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+36%3A9&version=WEB) — "With you is the fountain of life; in your light do we see light."

2. John's theology ([John 1:4](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A4&version=WEB))

 a. Life (zōē) = Divine essence — the source

 b. Light (phōs) = Divine revelation — the expression

 c. Life produces light; light reveals life

3. A repeating biblical pattern

 a. God gives life → life produces light → light defeats darkness → darkness represents death

 b. Seen in: [Genesis 1](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Genesis+1&version=WEB) → [Psalm 36](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Psalm+36%3A9&version=WEB) → [John 1](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A1-14&version=WEB) → [Revelation 21–22](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Revelation+21-22&version=WEB)

4. Creation parallel

 a. Genesis 1: Light created first; life follows

 b. John 1: Word → Life → Light — strong theological parallel

5. Eternal fulfillment

 a. [Revelation 21:23](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Revelation+21%3A23&version=WEB) — "The glory of God gives it light, and its lamp is the Lamb."

 b. [Revelation 22:1–2](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Revelation+22%3A1-2&version=WEB) — River of life, tree of life, eternal light — life and light completely united.


### Further Study: Christian Thought on Light and Life
1. Athanasius (On the Incarnation, 4th c.)

 a. Christ restores life by bringing light; darkness represents corruption and death; light restores creation

2. Augustine (4th–5th c.)

 a. Light = truth and knowledge of God; ignorance = darkness; union with God = life

3. John Calvin

 a. Light → revelation; Life → regeneration; the Spirit provides both illumination and new life
